name: Canvas Design
description: Create beautiful visual art and graphic design output in .png and .pdf formats using a design philosophy approach. Ships with an extensive collection of professional typefaces (30+ font families including geometric, serif, monospace, and display fonts) for high-quality typographic compositions.

findings_summary.notes: Official Anthropic skill from anthropics/skills repository. Contains SKILL.md, an extensive collection of OFL-licensed font files (30+ font families), and Apache-2.0 LICENSE.txt. Verified at skills/canvas-design/ in the repo tree.
